category.scope_note: General domestic furniture comparison — China manufacturing to EU market.

title.zh: 中国家具进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家具進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China furniture documentation against EU REACH, GPSR, EN structural standards, flammability requirements, and EUDR deforestation due diligence. Covers formaldehyde limits, restricted substances, general product safety, upholstery flammability, and market access including the CE-marking-not-required position for general furniture.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家具文件与欧盟REACH、GPSR、EN结构标准、阻燃要求及EUDR毁林尽职调查差距对照。涵盖甲醛限值、限制物质、通用产品安全、软垫阻燃性及市场准入（包括一般家具无需CE标志的明确说明）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家具文件與歐盟REACH、GPSR、EN結構標準、阻燃要求及EUDR毀林盡職調查差距對照。涵蓋甲醛限值、限制物質、通用產品安全、軟墊阻燃性及市場准入（包括一般家具無需CE標誌的明確說明）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current EU law, harmonised standards, REACH restrictions, GPSR obligations, and EUDR due diligence requirements with qualified professionals before shipment. Flammability requirements vary by EU member state — always verify destination-country national law.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、协调标准、REACH限制、GPSR义务及EUDR尽职调查要求。阻燃要求因欧盟成员国而异——请务必核实目的地国国家法律。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、協調標準、REACH限制、GPSR義務及EUDR盡職調查要求。阻燃要求因歐盟成員國而異——請務必核實目的地國國家法律。

answer_first.en: REACH formaldehyde limits (stricter than Chinese E1), GPSR general safety documentation and EU Responsible Person, SVHC/azo dye restricted substance screening, EUDR deforestation due diligence for wood products, and the member-state-dependent flammability requirements are the major EU gaps compared with Chinese GB furniture compliance. Note: general furniture does NOT require CE marking.
answer_first.zh: 相较中国GB家具合规，REACH甲醛限值（比中国E1更严格）、GPSR通用安全文件和欧盟责任人、SVHC/偶氮染料限制物质筛查、木材产品EUDR毁林尽职调查，以及因成员国而异的阻燃要求，是进入欧盟的主要差距。注意：一般家具无需CE标志。
answer_first.zht: 相較中國GB家具合規，REACH甲醛限值（比中國E1更嚴格）、GPSR通用安全文件和歐盟責任人、SVHC/偶氮染料限制物質篩查、木材產品EUDR毀林盡職調查，以及因成員國而異的阻燃要求，是進入歐盟的主要差距。注意：一般家具無需CE標誌。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, EU institutional source, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
